description_long: This factory building features a large, cylindrical smokestack made of reddish-brown brick rising from a concrete base, dominating the structure's profile. The main building is a rectangular, flat-roofed platform supported by a grid of metal framework and ladders, giving it an industrial, utilitarian appearance. Several smaller, rusted metal sheds and containers are scattered across the rooftop, suggesting storage or auxiliary workspaces. The exterior is primarily composed of weathered concrete and metal, with visible signs of aging and industrial use. No large industrial windows or loading dock doors are present, but the building is equipped with multiple access ladders and platforms. The overall design is functional, with minimal decorative elements, emphasizing practicality and durability.
description: A weathered industrial factory building with a tall brick smokestack, flat concrete roof, and scattered metal sheds and ladders.
description_view_0: Front view shows the prominent smokestack on the right, with metal sheds and a main entrance platform visible beneath the flat roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the smokestack's cylindrical form and the metal framework extending from the building's edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the smokestack, more rooftop sheds, and the supporting metal structure beneath the platform.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals additional rooftop sheds and the full length of the flat roof, with the smokestack positioned to the left.
